title: Sapporo Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Sapporo, with a Z-Score of -3.54. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Sapporo are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and daily life. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.4 GG, indicating a substantial demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 78%, and the wind speed is 23.0 km/h, making the cold even more unbearable.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
